attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CG1_MTL_ITEM_CATALOG_GROUPS_B)

 minus
 select ITEM_CATALOG_GROUP_ID ,PARENT_CATALOG_GROUP_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CG1_MTL_ITEM_CATALOG_GRPS_B
 ) ACM
 where 
 ACM.ITEM_CATALOG_GROUP_ID = STG_CG1_MTL_ITEM_CATLG_GRPS_B.ITEM_CATALOG_GROUP_ID and ACM.PARENT_CATALOG_GROUP_ID=STG_CG1_MTL_ITEM_CATLG_GRPS_B.PARENT_CATALOG_GROUP_ID and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CG1_MTL_ITEM_CATLG_GRPS_B.REFRESH_DATETIME
